message:
fix(browser): correct capability token generation in tests to use capability groups

Tests were using operation names (e.g., browser.click) as capability IDs
when generating tokens, but the browser connector declares grouped
capabilities (e.g., browser.interact covers both click and fill_form).
Split the test helper to accept separate capability and operation
parameters and add an operation-to-capability mapping table covering all
8 capability groups (capture, extract, interact, execute, cookies,
sessions, proxy, navigate) so tokens match the manifest's actual
capability structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
